description: Click immagine apre Read more e pausa carousel

userStories.title: Click sull'immagine apre Read more e ferma il carousel
userStories.description: As a visitor, clicking a card image should expand the Read more panel and pause the carousel, same as clicking the Read more button.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a click event listener on each `.card-thumb` element
When `.card-thumb` is clicked, find the `.card-toggle` button inside the same `.card` and programmatically click it (btn.click())
Add `cursor: pointer` to `.card-thumb` CSS so the image looks clickable
userStories.notes: The card-toggle click handler already handles expand/collapse and sets cardOpen. Calling btn.click() reuses all that logic without duplication. The card-thumb listener should be added after the card-toggle listeners are set up.
